targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT currency_code) FROM global_exchange_rates
SELECT rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code='USD' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code='EUR' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code='JPY' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT AVG(rate) FROM global_exchange_rates
SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT currency_code) FROM bot_exchange_rates
SELECT currency_code as 'currency code', rate FROM global_exchange_rates ORDER BY rate DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT currency_code as 'currency code', rate FROM global_exchange_rates ORDER BY rate ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(rate_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, 
  CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS rate 
FROM global_exchange_rates 
WHERE currency IN ($currency) 
ORDER BY rate_date

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(rate_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, 
  ABS(CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(18,4)) - LAG(CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(18,4))) OVER (PARTITION BY currency_code ORDER BY rate_date)) AS value
FROM global_exchange_rates
WHERE currency_code IN ($currency)

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(rate_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, 
  AVG(CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(18,4))) OVER (
    PARTITION BY currency_code 
    ORDER BY rate_date 
    ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS value
FROM global_exchange_rates
WHERE currency_code IN ($currency)
SELECT updated_at as time, (selling_rate-buying_rate) as value FROM bot_exchange_rates ORDER BY updated_at

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(rate_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, 
  CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS rate
FROM global_exchange_rates
WHERE currency_code IN ($currency)
ORDER BY rate_date

SELECT 
  STR_TO_DATE(rate_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time,
  CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS rate
FROM global_exchange_rates 
WHERE currency_code IN ($currency)
ORDER BY rate_date
